  "themes": [
    {
      "id": "A",
      "bar_start": 0,
      "bar_end": 13,
      "description": "Primary ballad theme in d minor; solemn, hymn-like homophony with characteristic neighbor-tone ornament (bars 1, 4). Descends from tonic triad through subdominant to dominant, evoking the Scottish ballad 'Edward'. Closes with half cadence leading into transitional dissolution (bars 5–13) via C major and augmented harmonies."
    },
    {
      "id": "A'",
      "bar_start": 13,
      "bar_end": 26,
      "description": "Varied restatement of the opening ballad theme. Harmonic elaboration in the middle section (bars 17–25) includes a C major digression with chromatic inner voices, a VII–III–iv prolongation, and a V–i perfect authentic cadence at bar 26."
    },
    {
      "id": "B",
      "bar_start": 27,
      "bar_end": 44,
      "description": "Contrasting middle section in D major / F# major (relative major region). Features a triplet-figuration texture (12th-note triplets in the bass) against sustained chords; sequential ascending third-relations through B minor and F# major with augmented sonorities (bars 34–36), culminating in a climactic fff in bars 38–44 with descending bass sequences."
    },
    {
      "id": "A''",
      "bar_start": 45,
      "bar_end": 59,
      "description": "Recapitulation of the ballad theme in d minor, now with enriched accompaniment texture (thicker chords, pp dynamic), ornamental chromatic passing tones, and extended harmonic prolongation of III (E-flat major / C major regions, bars 54–58). Ends on a deceptive cadence (bar 58) leading to the coda."
    },
    {
      "id": "Coda",
      "bar_start": 59,
      "bar_end": 72,
      "description": "Dissolving coda; fragmented recall of main theme motif with broken bass arpeggios (bars 60–67) and subdominant–dominant–tonic resolution. A brief tonicization of VI (bar 66) and III (bar 67) before final V–i plagal-tinged close in d minor (bars 70–72) with fermata on the final tonic chord."
    }
  ]
}
